run_summary.summary: Pipeline check-in 💼 xTool's Laura replied today — the P3 ($10K laser) is in-kind only, no cash, and she's asking Liz to pitch her creative vision before they finalize. Ball is in our court to share project ideas AND push for paid compensation. BHG x Walmart is rolling — Gretta ordered the outdoor table + 6 chairs on Apr 15 and is shipping to Batavia; waiting on delivery before filming. HelloFresh came back with another 'still building the list' reply to Liz's Apr 14 follow-up — keeping that thread warm but it's slow-moving.

suggestions.message: Laura (gengchunhong@xtool.com) replied this morning — the P3 is in-kind only (~$10K machine, no cash offered). She wants to hear Liz's creative ideas and project direction before locking in terms. Recommend replying with 2-3 DIY/craft concepts that would show off the P3 and making a case for paid compensation alongside the machine. She sounds collaborative and open to building around Liz's vision — good opening to negotiate.

deals.next_action: Reply to Laura with creative project ideas for P3 collab and negotiate paid terms
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Laura (xTool) replied — P3 (~$10K) offered in-kind only, no cash. She's asking Liz to share her creative direction and project ideas first, then they'll build the collab together. Good opportunity to pitch direction + push for paid component.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Laura (xTool) replied asking for Liz's creative vision for the P3 — in-kind collab, awaiting our pitch

deals.next_action: Wait for outdoor table + chairs to arrive, then schedule filming
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Gretta placing order for outdoor table + 6 chairs (6-person setting), shipping to Liz at Batavia IL. Contract signed Apr 13 (net-45 terms). Product expected within ~2 weeks.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Gretta ordered outdoor table + 6 chairs — waiting on product delivery before filming

deals.next_action: Wait for HelloFresh/Taskmetas creator list decision
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Hana (Taskmetas) replied to Liz's Apr 14 follow-up — brand still finalizing creator list, will reach out when ready.
